title: agrimonia eupatoria var. minor
intro: Agrimonia eupatoria var. minor, commonly known as lesser agrimony, is a variant of the agrimony plant, a flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Lesser agrimony has been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and inflammation, as well as to support the immune system and reduce anxiety. Herbal preparations of lesser agrimony include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
